lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Hmmph. What do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was just wondering what was down those stairs?

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: You can't go down there!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I didn't want to anyway.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Good. Because you can't.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Because I don't want to.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Because you can't. So that's fine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, it is.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Yes. Fine.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Absolutely.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Well then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why not?

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: This is the home of the Mountain Dwarves. How would you like it if I wanted to take a shortcut through your home?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ooh... is this a shortcut to somewhere?

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Well, it is a lot easier to go this way to get past White Wolf Mountain than through those wolf filled passes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, sorry, I hadn't realised it was private.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Well, it is.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If you were my friend I wouldn't mind.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Yes, but I don't even know you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, let's be friends!

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: I'd rather not, thank you.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: I'd rather not, thank you.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: I don't make friends easily. People need to earn my trust first.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And how am I meant to do that?

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: My, we are the persistent one aren't we?

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Well, there's a certain gold artefact we're after. We dwarves are big fans of gold! This artefact is the first prize at the Hemenster fishing competition.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Fortunately we have acquired a pass to enter that competition...

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Unfortunately Dwarves don't make good fishermen.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fortunately I'm alright at fishing!

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Okay. I entrust you with our competition pass. Don't forget to take some gold with you for the entrance fee.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Go to Hemenster and do us proud!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're a grumpy little man aren't you?

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Don't you know it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're a grumpy little man aren't you?

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Don't you know it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm bigger than you. Let me by!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: ...stumpy.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Go away! You're not going to bully your way in HERE!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was just stopping to say hello!

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Hello then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have a brother?

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: What if I do! It's no business of yours.

sections.title: After starting but before completing Fishing Contest

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Have you won yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, not yet.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Well don't give up! Maybe old Jack can give you a few tips.

lines.speaker: Austri
lines.text: Welcome, oh great Fishing Champion! Feel free to pop by and use our tunnel any time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you, I think I'll stop by for a beer one day.
